title: butea oblongifolia
intro: Butea oblongifolia, also known as the flame of the forest, is a flowering plant native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Butea oblongifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of decoctions, infusions, and tonics, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
